description: Full bidirectional HeyReach LinkedIn automation integration with Ops tables — push leads to campaigns, pull engagement data back, webhook-driven activity tracking, ops rules automation, multi-sender support, scheduled sync, and LinkedIn activity timeline columns

input.source: Discovery conversation with user + HeyReach API research
extractedRequirements: Full bidirectional sync: push leads to HeyReach campaigns, pull engagement data back into Ops tables
Org-level HeyReach API key (one per org, all senders visible to team)

Webhook receiver for all 9 HeyReach event types (connection_request_sent/accepted, message_sent, message_reply_received, inmail_sent, inmail_reply_received, follow_sent, liked_post, viewed_profile, lead_tag_updated)
Wire all webhook events as Ops Rules triggers with all action types (task, Slack, deal stage, cell update, cross-integration, re-campaign)
Multi-sender support via column-based sender assignment in ops tables
Individual metric columns (reply_count, accept_status, last_contacted, etc.) toggleable per table
Combined LinkedIn Activity timeline view available via 'View Activity' button in row detail panel
Manual bulk push: select rows → 'Push to HeyReach' action
Auto-push rules: 'When row added with filter X → auto-add to Campaign Y'
Scheduled sync: 'Every morning, push new rows matching filter to Campaign Z'
Webhook health monitoring: alert if webhooks silent for 24h
Campaign picker UI with field mapping (ops columns → HeyReach lead fields)
LinkedIn Sender column type for per-row sender assignment
extractedConstraints: HeyReach API auth: X-API-KEY header, 300 req/min rate limit
HeyReach webhooks: no HMAC signature — use API-key-based auth on our webhook URL
HeyReach webhook retries: 5 attempts over 24h on failure
Lead push requires: First Name, Last Name, LinkedIn URL (required), plus optional email, company, position, custom vars
Campaigns must exist in HeyReach already (cannot create via API)
Campaign must be Active for leads to be added
Follow existing integration patterns: instantly_org_credentials, heyreach_org_integrations, campaign_links
Use getCorsHeaders(req) for edge functions, pin supabase-js@2.43.4
Supabase auth only (no Clerk), maybeSingle() for optional records
Store credentials in service-role-only table, never expose to frontend

answeredQuestions.q: Which webhook events as rule triggers?

answeredQuestions.a: C — Individual columns + timeline view in detail panel
D — Manual + auto-push rules + scheduled sync

briefImprovements: BIDIRECTIONAL: Two-way sync from day one — auto-pull engagement data as live columns
AUTOMATION: Wire HeyReach webhook events into Ops Rules engine for cross-system triggers
MULTI-SENDER: Column-based LinkedIn sender assignment per row/segment
UX: LinkedIn Activity timeline column type — chronological feed per lead inline in ops table
OPS: Webhook health monitoring — heartbeat check, alert if silent 24h

codebaseFindings.closestPattern: Instantly integration (campaign links, field mapping, engagement sync)
codebaseFindings.existingWebhookInfra: ops-table-inbound handler with API key auth, rate limiting, AI field mapping
codebaseFindings.opsRulesEngine: supabase/migrations/20260205600000_ops_rules.sql — can wire webhook events as triggers
codebaseFindings.linkedinEnrichment: Exists via Apify (profile scraping) but no outreach automation

risks.issue: No HMAC signature from HeyReach webhooks
risks.mitigation: Use unique API key per org in webhook URL path for auth
LinkedIn URL + email as compound identifier

risks.issue: Webhook payload schema not fully documented
risks.mitigation: Capture first payloads, log raw, iterate mapping

team.tierReason: 12 stories, schema changes, external API (HeyReach), ops rules wiring, new column types, webhook infra, scheduled sync — needs Opus oversight

stories.title: Database Schema — HeyReach Integration Tables
stories.description: Create heyreach_org_credentials (service-role-only), heyreach_org_integrations (public metadata), heyreach_campaign_links (field mapping + sender), heyreach_sync_history (activity log). Extend source_type enums. RLS policies following Instantly pattern.
acceptance: Migration creates heyreach_org_credentials with org_id PK, api_key TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at
Migration creates heyreach_org_integrations with id, org_id UNIQUE, connected_by_user_id, is_active, is_connected, connected_at, last_sync_at, last_webhook_received_at, created_at, updated_at

Migration creates heyreach_campaign_links with id, table_id FK, org_id FK, campaign_id TEXT, campaign_name, field_mapping JSONB, sender_column_key TEXT, auto_sync_engagement BOOLEAN, UNIQUE(table_id, campaign_id)
Migration creates heyreach_sync_history with id, table_id FK, campaign_id, sync_type CHECK, rows_processed, rows_succeeded, rows_failed, error_message, metadata JSONB
Extends dynamic_table_rows.source_type to include 'heyreach'
Adds dynamic_table_rows.heyreach_lead_id TEXT column
RLS: credentials service-role-only, integrations org-read/admin-write, campaign_links org-read/admin-write
All policies use DROP POLICY IF EXISTS before CREATE POLICY
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Connection Setup — API Key & Config
stories.description: Edge function: heyreach-admin (connect/disconnect/validate). Frontend: HeyReachConfigModal with API key input, connection status, disconnect. Store credentials via service role.
acceptance: Edge function heyreach-admin handles connect, disconnect, check_status actions
Connect validates API key by calling HeyReach API, stores in heyreach_org_credentials
Disconnect removes credentials, sets is_connected=false
HeyReachConfigModal wraps ConfigureModal with API key input and connection status
HeyReach card added to Integrations.tsx page
useHeyReachIntegration hook with isConnected, connect(apiKey), disconnect(), loading
Toast feedback on connect/disconnect
Edge function uses getCorsHeaders(req) and pins @supabase/supabase-js@2.43.4
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

stories.title: Campaign Discovery & Linking
stories.description: Edge function to list campaigns from HeyReach API. Campaign picker UI. Field mapping interface (ops columns → HeyReach lead fields). Create heyreach_campaign_links records.
acceptance: heyreach-admin extended with list_campaigns and get_campaign_details actions
HeyReachCampaignPicker shows campaigns with name, status, sender count
Only Active campaigns can be linked
Field mapping UI maps HeyReach fields to ops table columns
Required fields (first_name, last_name, linkedin_url) validated before linking
Link Campaign creates heyreach_campaign_links record
Linked campaign shown in ops table toolbar with name + status badge
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

stories.title: Sender Account Management
stories.description: Fetch sender accounts from HeyReach API. 'LinkedIn Sender' column type for ops tables. Sender picker dropdown in column cells. Store sender assignment per row.
acceptance: Edge function fetches sender accounts from HeyReach API
New ops table column type heyreach_sender with dropdown of available senders
Only senders assigned to linked campaign shown in dropdown
Selected sender stored as cell value (sender_id)
Bulk-assign sender action on selected rows
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

stories.title: Webhook Receiver — All Events
stories.description: Edge function: heyreach-webhook handler. Receive all 9 event types. API-key-based auth via URL query param. Parse payloads, resolve to ops table rows by LinkedIn URL/email. Log to heyreach_sync_history and integration_sync_logs. Rate limit 300 req/min.
acceptance: Edge function heyreach-webhook receives POST requests with verify_jwt=false
Auth via API key in URL query parameter matched against heyreach_org_integrations
Handles all 9 event types
Resolves webhook to ops table row by LinkedIn URL (primary) or email (fallback)
Updates last_webhook_received_at on every event
Logs to integration_sync_logs with integration_name='heyreach'
Logs to heyreach_sync_history with sync_type='webhook_event'
Rate limit 300 req/min per org
Returns 200 on valid, 401 on invalid key, 429 on rate limit
Webhook URL displayed in HeyReachConfigModal for user to copy
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Manual Push — Bulk Action
stories.description: Bulk action 'Push to HeyReach' on selected ops table rows. Apply field mapping from campaign link. Respect sender column assignment. Batch via HeyReach API (100/request). Log to sync history. Toast feedback with success/fail counts.
acceptance: Push to HeyReach bulk action in ops table toolbar when rows selected + campaign linked
Confirmation dialog shows count and campaign name
Validates required fields present on selected rows
Edge function heyreach-sync-outbound applies field mapping and batches at 100/request
Sender assignment from sender column included per row
Stores heyreach_lead_id on dynamic_table_rows
Logs to heyreach_sync_history and integration_sync_logs
Toast shows success/fail counts
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

stories.title: Inbound Engagement Sync — Live Columns
stories.description: Process webhook events into ops table cells. Auto-create engagement columns. Upsert cells with source_type='heyreach'. Individual columns toggleable by user.
acceptance: Auto-create engagement columns on first webhook: heyreach_status, heyreach_connection_status, heyreach_reply_count, heyreach_last_activity, heyreach_last_activity_type, heyreach_message_count
Webhook events update corresponding cells
heyreach_status computed from latest event type
Users can toggle engagement columns visible/hidden
Engagement column cells are read-only
Column headers show HeyReach icon indicator
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

stories.title: LinkedIn Activity Timeline
stories.description: 'View Activity' button in row detail panel. Chronological feed of all HeyReach events per lead. Rich timeline UI with icons, timestamps, message previews.
acceptance: View LinkedIn Activity button in row detail panel when row has HeyReach data
Timeline shows events in reverse chronological order
Each event has icon per type, description, relative timestamp
Reply events highlighted with accent color
Message events show preview text if available
Empty state: No LinkedIn activity yet
Timeline accessible from row detail panel and clicking heyreach_last_activity cell
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

stories.title: Ops Rules — Webhook Event Triggers
stories.description: Wire all 9 HeyReach webhook events as ops rule triggers. Support all action types. Rule builder UI for HeyReach events.
acceptance: Migration extends ops_rules.trigger_type CHECK to include 10 heyreach_ trigger types
Migration extends ops_rules.action_type CHECK to include push_to_heyreach
Webhook handler evaluates matching ops rules after each event
Rule builder UI shows HeyReach triggers under LinkedIn/HeyReach category
All existing action types work with HeyReach triggers
push_to_heyreach action type picks target campaign + reuses field mapping
Rule execution logged to ops_rule_executions
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

stories.title: Auto-Push Rules
stories.description: When row added/updated matching filter → auto-push to HeyReach Campaign. Field mapping inherited from campaign link. Debounce to prevent duplicates.
acceptance: row_created/cell_updated trigger + push_to_heyreach action wired together
Filter conditions match on any cell value
Field mapping inherited from heyreach_campaign_links
Debounce: skip duplicate push to same campaign within 5 minutes
Auto-push logged with metadata.trigger='auto_rule'
Rule can be paused/resumed independently
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

stories.title: Scheduled Sync
stories.description: Scheduled push of new rows matching filter to HeyReach campaign. Configurable frequency. Only pushes rows created after last_push_at.
acceptance: sync_schedule JSONB column added to heyreach_campaign_links
Edge function heyreach-scheduled-sync queries enabled schedules and pushes matching rows
Only new rows logic: push rows created after last_push_at matching filter
Schedule config UI: frequency picker + filter builder + enable toggle
Logged with metadata.trigger='scheduled'
Callable by Supabase cron
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

stories.title: Webhook Health Monitoring
stories.description: Monitor webhook health. Alert if silent 24h. Health indicator in config modal.
acceptance: Edge function heyreach-health-check runs every 6 hours
Flags integration as unhealthy if last_webhook_received_at > 24h ago with active campaign links
Unhealthy triggers Slack notification + in-app toast
Health indicator in HeyReachConfigModal: green/yellow/red dot
Last webhook received timestamp displayed
Skips integrations with no campaign links
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

mvp.delivers: Connect HeyReach, link campaigns, push leads manually, receive webhook events, see engagement data in ops table
